dialogue.text: The day is so short, a hundred years of hardship easily fulfilled.
dialogue.zh: 白日何短短，百年苦易滿。
dialogue.ja: 白日何短短，百年苦易滿。
dialogue.local: 白日何短短，百年苦易滿。
dialogue.local_pron: bai ri he duan duan, bai nian ku yi man
dialogue.zh_pron: bai ri he duan duan, bai nian ku yi man

dialogue.text: The vast sky is boundless, the eternal Taiji lasts through countless calamities.
dialogue.zh: 蒼穹浩茫茫，萬劫太極長。
dialogue.ja: 蒼穹浩茫茫，萬劫太極長。
dialogue.local: 蒼穹浩茫茫，萬劫太極長。
dialogue.local_pron: cang qiong hao mang mang, wan jie tai ji chang
dialogue.zh_pron: cang qiong hao mang mang, wan jie tai ji chang

dialogue.text: Magu's hair falls on both temples, half already turned to frost.
dialogue.zh: 麻姑垂兩鬢，一半已成霜。
dialogue.ja: 麻姑垂兩鬢，一半已成霜。
dialogue.local: 麻姑垂兩鬢，一半已成霜。
dialogue.local_pron: ma gu chui liang bin, yi ban yi cheng shuang
dialogue.zh_pron: ma gu chui liang bin, yi ban yi cheng shuang

dialogue.text: Heaven sees the Jade Maiden and laughs loudly a billion times.
dialogue.zh: 天公見玉女，大笑億千場。
dialogue.ja: 天公見玉女，大笑億千場。
dialogue.local: 天公見玉女，大笑億千場。
dialogue.local_pron: tian gong jian yu nu, da xiao yi qian chang
dialogue.zh_pron: tian gong jian yu nu, da xiao yi qian chang

dialogue.text: I want to embrace six dragons, turning the chariot to hang on Fusang.
dialogue.zh: 吾欲攬六龍，回車掛扶桑。
dialogue.ja: 吾欲攬六龍，回車掛扶桑。
dialogue.local: 吾欲攬六龍，回車掛扶桑。
dialogue.local_pron: wu yu lan liu long, hui che gua fu sang
dialogue.zh_pron: wu yu lan liu long, hui che gua fu sang

dialogue.text: The Big Dipper pours fine wine, urging each dragon to drink a cup.
dialogue.zh: 北斗酌美酒，勸龍各一觴。
dialogue.ja: 北斗酌美酒，勸龍各一觴。
dialogue.local: 北斗酌美酒，勸龍各一觴。
dialogue.local_pron: bei dou zhuo mei jiu, quan long ge yi shang
dialogue.zh_pron: bei dou zhuo mei jiu, quan long ge yi shang

dialogue.text: Wealth and honor are not my wishes, but to keep my youthful glow with others.
dialogue.zh: 富貴非所願，與人駐顏光。
dialogue.ja: 富貴非所願，與人駐顏光。
dialogue.local: 富貴非所願，與人駐顏光。
dialogue.local_pron: fu gui fei suo yuan, yu ren zhu yan guang
dialogue.zh_pron: fu gui fei suo yuan, yu ren zhu yan guang
